sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6733" key="a)naklinopa/lh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακλῑνοπάλη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mart.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.201</biblScope> </bibl> (<sense id="n6733.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπι-</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
